testcase.name: test_eligible_companies_march_2026_existing_invoices

failure.message: AssertionError: Expected 'Invoice already exists' reason for Golden Rise International assert 'Invoice already exists' in 'Start date (2026-04-01) is after billing period (2026-03)' + where 'Start date (2026-04-01) is after billing period (2026-03)' = <built-in method get of dict object at 0xfb8620be7900>('reason', '') + where <built-in method get of dict object at 0xfb8620be7900> = {'company_name': 'Golden Rise International', 'id': 'b300720d-4282-4ea1-b87a-de89a7102587', 'plan_name': 'Open Desk', 'reason': 'Start date (2026-04-01) is after billing period (2026-03)', ...}.get

testcase.failure: tests/test_auto_invoice.py:80: in test_eligible_companies_march_2026_existing_invoices assert "Invoice already exists" in company.get("reason", ""), f"Expected 'Invoice already exists' reason for {company['company_name']}" E AssertionError: Expected 'Invoice already exists' reason for Golden Rise International E assert 'Invoice already exists' in 'Start date (2026-04-01) is after billing period (2026-03)' E + where 'Start date (2026-04-01) is after billing period (2026-03)' = <built-in method get of dict object at 0xfb8620be7900>('reason', '') E + where <built-in method get of dict object at 0xfb8620be7900> = {'company_name': 'Golden Rise International', 'id': 'b300720d-4282-4ea1-b87a-de89a7102587', 'plan_name': 'Open Desk', 'reason': 'Start date (2026-04-01) is after billing period (2026-03)', ...}.get

testcase.name: test_generate_respects_start_date_validation

failure.message: AssertionError: Unexpected status: 500 assert 500 in [200, 404] + where 500 = <Response [500]>.status_code

testcase.failure: tests/test_auto_invoice.py:162: in test_generate_respects_start_date_validation assert resp.status_code in [200, 404], f"Unexpected status: {resp.status_code}" E AssertionError: Unexpected status: 500 E assert 500 in [200, 404] E + where 500 = <Response [500]>.status_code

testcase.name: test_generate_returns_no_eligible_message
testcase.failure: tests/test_auto_invoice.py:180: in test_generate_returns_no_eligible_message assert resp.status_code == 200 E assert 500 == 200 E + where 500 = <Response [500]>.status_code
